name: Life360 Inc.
analysis: 360 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 60% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$22.0800, stop A$18.7110, target A$27.0700 (1.48:1) — then trail it.
